publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 110-111. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: I have but a moment this morning, but I do not like to leave you without a line since tomorrow there is no post.
The weather is worse than ever again, Alas!--
Susette is going to leave me. I think that she is right in doing so, her views being what they are; & I find
her warning rather honorable to her than otherwise.--
I must consider what to do. In many respects I do not require anything of a regular lady's maid, & in fact such is in my way often & greatly.
I want some one to make & take care of my clothes, but not a personal attendant.
Every day I think I require the latter less.--
thinking about leaving this soon, if the weather does not mend. However I shall write on Monday Morg.
